projects.title: ChickenWorld – Restaurant E-commerce Frontend
projects.description: A modern restaurant e-commerce frontend built with Next.js. Features include dynamic product listings, cart functionality, and a checkout form integrated with a third-party restaurant API.

projects.title: Book Vibe
projects.description: A modern, persistent web application designed for book lovers to organize their reading journey. Built with React 19 and styled with Tailwind CSS v4, this app allows users to curate a personal bookshelf, track reading progress, and visualize data in real-time.

projects.title: Digi-Tools
projects.description: Digi-Tools is a modern web application where users can explore and purchase subscriptions for various AI tools. It provides a smooth and interactive experience for selecting tools, managing a cart, and viewing the total subscription cost in real-time. The project focuses on clean UI design and user-friendly functionality.

projects.title: Type With Hasib
projects.description: An interactive, logic-driven typing assessment tool developed under the CoDeHaSiB brand. This application measures typing speed (WPM), accuracy, and error rates in real-time, providing instant feedback to the user.

projects.title: Pay With Hasib
projects.description: A streamlined, interactive banking dashboard designed for modern financial management. This project focuses on a clean user experience (UX) for essential banking operations.

projects.title: Track My Time
projects.description: A robust time-management application developed under the CoDeHaSiB brand. This tool empowers users to log their daily activities, categorize them, and gain real-time insights into their time distribution.

projects.title: Github Issue Tracker
projects.description: GitHub Issue Tracker is a modern web application designed to simulate and manage issue tracking workflows similar to GitHub. It allows users to explore, organize, and interact with issues in a clean and intuitive interface.The platform focuses on providing a smooth user experience for handling project-related tasks such as bug reports, feature requests, and development discussions. Issue tracking systems are widely used in software development to manage tasks, feedback, and collaboration efficiently . This project demonstrates a practical implementation of real-world issue management concepts with a responsive UI, dynamic data handling, and structured component architecture.

education.title: Self-Taught Full Stack Web Development
education.description: Focused on mastering modern web technologies through hands-on projects and structured courses.
